scope: WB AUTO first-drag diagnosis and minimal takeover fix

simulator.drag_automation_limitation: Computer Use exposed click/type only; osascript accessibility was denied and CGEvent drag was not accepted by Simulator.

diagnostics.observed_root_cause: AUTO boundary takeover could force-write the current boundary tick, so the first drag completed a dispatch path without a visible manual value change.

capture_screen: Added DEBUG simulator-only WB UI fallback for no-camera simulator diagnosis.
Changed AUTO boundary takeover to target an adjacent manual tick instead of the same boundary tick.
capture_bottom_parameter_bar: Added DEBUG WB drag consumption diagnostics.

contracts.wb: runtime contract unchanged; AUTO takeover target fixed

risks: Real-device WB first right-drag still needs confirmation.
If runtime auto preset callbacks clear pending manual state, the new diagnostics should be used for a follow-up fix.
